title: Apply World Update Payload
description: Strict contract for the fs-manager MCP server to execute safe, zero-touch filesystem modifications across hybrid storage layers. The Inference Node must conform to this schema exactly — any deviation is rejected before execution.

session_id.description: The UUID of the current active role-play session. Required for continuity and audit logging.

log_entry.description: Human-readable narrative summary of the action. Appended to the session's Markdown transcript in data/lore/core/sessions/.

updates.description: A batch array of explicit file modification operations. All operations are validated and executed atomically.

target_file.description: Relative path to the target file. Strictly restricted by regex to prevent directory traversal attacks. Community writes are sandboxed to their own namespace.

operation.description: The CRUD operation to perform. 'update' merges data into existing JSON. 'create' writes a new file (fails if exists). 'append' concatenates string content to Markdown files.

data.description: The payload. Must be a JSON object or array for data/state/ targets. Must be a string for data/lore/ append operations.

protected_check.description: If true (default), the fs-manager will reject any attempt to modify protected fields (unique_id, world_seed, namespace, created_at, canon).

metadata.description: Optional metadata for logging and debugging.

agent.description: Which agent generated this world update.

confidence.description: Optional confidence score from the Fact-Extractor (0.0 to 1.0).
